# Attio (duplicate AIR-76)

> AI Registry entry [AIR-94](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-94/attio) — status **Backlog** as of 2026-05-05. Departments: —.

**Category:** AI-Native CRM
**Status:** Backlog
**Cost:** Free; Plus ~$29/seat; Pro ~$59/seat; Enterprise custom
**Departments:** Commercial

## Overview

Modern AI-native CRM for fast-moving teams wanting bespoke data models rather than legacy schema. Same vendor as AIR-76 — this appears to be a duplicate entry; AIR-76 is the active Sandbox version evaluated by Andrew. AIR-94 created 2026-05-05 separately during the CRM matrix evaluation.

## Capabilities (same as AIR-76)

* Flexible data model — custom objects, attributes, relationships
* AI Research Agent — researches accounts/contacts, writes back enriched fields
* Workflows — visual automation with AI steps
* Email & Calendar sync (Gmail, Outlook, Workspace, MS Calendar)
* Reports & Dashboards
* Lists & Pipelines (Kanban, table, timeline)
* Real-time collaboration

## Bakeoff Context

In Andrew Weekly 5 May 2026 CRM matrix alongside HubSpot (AIR-77), Monday (AIR-83), Salesforce (AIR-93). Differentiator: AI-native from ground up rather than legacy with AI bolted on.

## Possible Duplicate Note (Andrew Weekly 2026-05-05)

From AIR-77 HubSpot evaluation: *"AIR-94 Attio (POSSIBLE DUPLICATE) — Subagent reported no existing Attio entry and created AIR-94. However, HubSpot subagent (run in parallel) reported AIR-76 already exists for Attio. This is likely a race-condition or registry-search miss. **Manual dedup required — verify whether AIR-76 and AIR-94 both exist and merge if duplicated.**"*

## Security & Compliance

* SOC 2 Type II
* GDPR; EU data residency option (verify)
* SSO/SAML and SCIM on Enterprise

*Backlog. POSSIBLE DUPLICATE of AIR-76 — manual dedup required.*
